programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Error de identidad
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan un atentado local, pero enfrentan tensión y resistencia de la comunidad. Mientras, Frank debe lidiar con las consecuencias políticas cuando un hombre golpea a un oficial que fue demasiado agresivo en su interrogatorio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Lazos que unen
programme.desc: La lealtad de Danny se pone a prueba en el caso de un amigo de la infancia vinculado a la mafia. Frank se entera de que el crimen aumenta por una decisión judicial.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Espectro
programme.desc: Danny busca al distribuidor de una nueva y letal marca de heroína. Frank hace todo lo posible para ayudar a sacar las drogas de las calles.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Asuntos pendientes
programme.desc: Danny y Maria buscan a un veterano con posible estrés postraumático. Frank es sorprendido en una conferencia de prensa por una mujer que busca justicia para su hija asesinada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamada a Texas para realizar consultas sobre los asesinatos de prostitutas, la evidencia apunta a asesinatos con connotaciones religiosas. Pero a medida que profundicen en la investigación, el equipo podría poner en riesgo sus vidas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras que el equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un oficial del Mossad en Virginia, Tony y Ziva viajan a Berlín para rastrear al asesino de su padre.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Ignorando las órdenes de Seguridad Nacional, el equipo busca a Bodnar para vengar las muertes de Eli David y Jackie Vance.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un investigador del Departamento de Defensa analiza la responsabilidad del equipo en el caso Bodnar; el equipo debe determinar si un contramaestre está sufriendo de paranoia o no al declarar que estaba siendo perseguido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La búsqueda internacional del asesino de Eli David y Jackie Vance da un giro cuando comienza una cacería de brujas federal contra Gibbs y su equipo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Reinas de Manhattan
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una reina drag en un parque local. Erin reabre un caso de drogas tras ser secuestrada por la madre del acusado.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate driver attempts to flee on foot. Officers investigate a complaint in front of a local convenience store. Officers coordinate a sting designed to apprehend suspects who patronize prostitutes.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chase ends when one of the police units successfully performs a pit maneuver which eventually disables the vehicle. An officer responds to a domestic dispute between a mother and her son. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with expired tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress call at a local tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are left to solve the crime after signs of an apparent stabbing. A man loiters in a private park. A driver insists that the car is his - even though he needs a screwdriver to start the ignition and the plates are stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist on a call regarding a fight at a local residence. On a felony stop a juvenile male with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While on a date, Stokes realizes a piece of art at an exhibit has decomposing body parts in it, which leads to a full-blown investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The former Mayor of Las Vegas is shot at the Mob Museum and the CSIs embark on a history lesson in search of clues.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a hijacked medevac helicopter with CSI Brody aboard goes missing, the entire team is on hunt.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a Jane Doe is found near the freakish attractions of a 19th-century-inspired traveling sideshow, the team investigates a cast of unusual characters.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team arrives at a car crash, they find three casualties and a human brain that doesn't belong to any of the victims.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates three seemingly unrelated murders, they discover someone is getting revenge for cold case murders that were never solved.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers a deceased rancher was also a ballistics expert, they have to work with the FBI to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the body of a naked dead man is discovered by Dr. Robbins' wife in their master bedroom, it leads to a lot of questions for the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Willows works with the FBI again after a professional hit occurs at a law firm she's recommended to her friend.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team says goodbye to Catherine Willows as she makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead and her hair is done up '70s style complete with vintage clothes, the CSI team discovers clues that point to a killer with a hair fetish.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell asks for advice from a former colleague on a case involving the death of a man's ex-girlfriend. Elisabeth Shue Joins The Cast As New CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a house is stolen completely off its foundation, the CSIs are on the case in search of answers. Meanwhile, new CSI Julie Finlay showcases her skill in blood analysis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a blackout cripples the city, the CSIs must revert to old-school methods to solve the case of a missing child.

programme.title: Una mujer maltratada

programme.title: Regreso a Cold Mountain
programme.desc: Una historia dramática de amor en los principios de la Guerra Civil. Nicole Kidman, Jude Law y Renée Zellweger protagonizan esta película emotiva y que te atrapa del director ganador de un Óscar, Anthony Minghella’s (The English patient).

programme.title: Una lección de vida Griffin y Phoenix
programme.desc: La fuerza de vivir es una historia de amor conmovedora y gracioso entre dos personas que se enfrentan a un obstáculo aparentemente insuperable que puede interponerse entre ellos y la última oportunidad que tienen para encontrar el amor.

programme.title: Que linda adivina
programme.desc: Cuando el carnicero Leo regresa de un viaje de pesca, no puede esperar para mostrar su "presa": su bella esposa, una clarividente llamada Marina. Pronto se entera de una psíquica que transforma a los curtidos habitantes de la ciudad en niños enamorados.

programme.title: La dulce vida
programme.desc: Poppy es una maestra de escuela del norte de Londres, que con su optimismo, supera los pequeños dramas de la vida y contagia de alegría a quienes la rodean.

programme.title: Regreso a Cold Mountain
programme.desc: Una historia dramática de amor en los principios de la Guerra Civil. Nicole Kidman, Jude Law y Renée Zellweger protagonizan esta película emotiva y que te atrapa del director ganador de un Óscar, Anthony Minghella’s (The English patient).

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Terremoto en Guatemala
programme.desc: Tras el devastador terremoto de 1976 en Guatemala (7.6 Richter), se destaca la historia de amor y sacrificio de una pareja recién casada, víctimas del desastre. Un relato conmovedor sobre la fuerza del compromiso en medio de la tragedia.

programme.title: El álamo
programme.desc: John Wayne y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta espectacular película histórica sobre el ataque de las tropas mexicanas en el in Álamo.

programme.title: El camino del oeste
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta suntuosa historia de los hombres y mujeres que dejaron la comodidad y seguridad de sus vidas por la promesa de una tierra libre y una vida mejor en el indómito Oeste.

programme.title: El regreso de los siete magnificos
programme.desc: Protagonizada por Yul Brynner y con un reparto estelar que incluye a Robert Fuller, Warren Oates y Claude Akins, este western de aventuras sigue a los siete magníficos hasta México, donde se enfrentarán al duelo de sus vidas.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: 11 Grados de Culpa
programme.desc: 11 ex-compañeros de colegio disfrutan de una opulenta celebración y son sorprendidos por la inesperada visita de Mónica que es asesinada en los jardines de la casa creando una investigación.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Dos madres angustiadas, cuyos hijos murieron por disparos en un automóvil en movimiento, se unen para vengar sus muertes después de que las autoridades locales no tomen medidas.

programme.title: Stephen King's un buen matrimonio
programme.desc: Con un asesino serial suelto y un desconocido acosando a su familia, una esposa dedicada revela un secreto sobre su marido que amenaza su matrimonio y sus vidas.

programme.title: Justicia verdadera
programme.desc: El asesino de "Black Magic" anda suelto, asesinando bailarinas que encajan misteriosamente con la descripción de la nueva policía Sarah Montgomery.

programme.title: Justicia verdadera
programme.desc: Los detectives de Elijah Kane buscan amenazar la forma de hacer las cosas de Kane mientras el equipo tiene que rastrear a un imitador de “Black Magic” antes de que continúe con su ola de asesinatos.

programme.title: Justo a tiempo
programme.desc: Gene llega a su casa después de asistir al funeral de su exesposa. Al poco tiempo, secuestran a su hija. Recibe una pistola y la tarea de matar a una persona en una hora y quince minutos. De lo contrario, su hija será asesinada.

programme.title: Amenaza virtual
programme.desc: En este emocionante y trepidante thriller, el genio de la informática Milo Hoffman (Ryan Phillippe) consigue el trabajo de sus sueños solo para descubrir que el director ejecutivo (Tim Robbins) puede emplear prácticas comerciales muy poco ortodoxas.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: Ocho hombres
programme.desc: Una dramatización sobre el infame Escándalo de los Medias Negras de 1919, en el que ocho miembros de los Chicago White Sox conspiraron con apostadores para entregar la Serie Mundial a cambio de dinero.

programme.title: Familia de medianoche
programme.desc: La familia Ochoa opera una ambulancia privada en las áreas más ricas de la Ciudad de México, compitiendo con otros técnicos de emergencias médicas en una industria feroz y éticamente tensa.

programme.title: Crepúsculo
programme.desc: Le leyenda del cine, Paul Newman encabeza un electo luminoso en esta aclamada intriga llena de estrellas y suspenso.

programme.title: El arma secreta
programme.desc: En Nuevo México, el General Leslie Groves (Paul Newman) está a cargo de "El Proyecto Manhattan": el esfuerzo estadounidense de la Segunda Guerra Mundial que producirá dos armas atómicas llamadas "Hombre Gordo" y "Pequeño Niño".

programme.title: Ocho hombres
programme.desc: Una dramatización sobre el infame Escándalo de los Medias Negras de 1919, en el que ocho miembros de los Chicago White Sox conspiraron con apostadores para entregar la Serie Mundial a cambio de dinero.

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: Este éxito escalofriante y aclamado por la crítica acelerará sus corazones desde el principio hasta el fin.

programme.title: Contrarreloj
programme.desc: Un ex ladrón busca desesperadamente a su hija que ha sido secuestrada y encerrada en el maletero de un taxi. Protagonizada por Nicolas Cage y Malin Akerman.

programme.desc: Nicolas Cage enciende un barril de pólvora de acción mientras un veterano agente de la CIA va a la caza de su némesis, un terrorista mortal.

programme.title: Instinto predador

programme.title: Damage (LAS)

programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: El monje

programme.title: Un gallo con muchos huevos
programme.desc: Cuando su hogar se ve amenazado por un malvado granjero, un pequeño gallo viene al rescate. En esta excelente película animada de larga duración, la cual garantiza hacer reír a toda la familia.

programme.title: El fantasma

programme.title: El monje
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat y Seann William Scott protagonizan esta gran aventura, en la que un misterioso monje tibetano, quien ha protejido un pergamino por 60 años; cree que ha encontrado a su sucesor: un joven callejero.

programme.desc: Juguetilandia está en peligro por el malvado Barnaby (Richard Mulligan) y solo puede salvarla Lisa (Drew Barrymore), una niña que no cree en los juguetes. También protagonizada por Eileen Brennan, Keanu Reeves y Pat Morita.

programme.title: Una navidad para recordar
programme.desc: Sebastián, quien odia la Navidad y enfrenta su primer año sin sus hijos después de un divorcio, decide pasar la temporada con su madre Ángela, quien padece de Alzheimer.

programme.title: Mi amor en navidad
programme.desc: Lucas, un famoso cantante cuyo mayor éxito ha sido "Mi Amor en Navidad", decide tomarse un descanso, volviendo a su pueblo natal para pasar las fiestas. Allí se reencuentra con Elisa, su primer amor y la inspiración de su éxito navideño.

programme.title: Deliciosa Navidad
programme.desc: Máximo, chef de cocina molecular, hereda un restaurante dirigido por Luciana, experta en cocina típica. Durante la Navidad, ambos se enfrentan por sus diferentes visiones de la vida, la cocina y el amor, creando una combinación explosiva y deliciosa.

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: Especies

programme.title: Hellraiser: La puerta del infierno

programme.desc: Nada puede prepararte para el caos alucinante de Operación Overlord. El mega productor J.J. Abrams crea un emocionante viaje retorcido sobre un equipo de tropas estadounidenses que se encuentran cara a cara con los súper soldados nazis nunca vistos.

programme.title: Cementerio de mascotas

programme.title: The Broken Star
programme.desc: A marshal murders a rancher for gold, but is foiled by his assistant.

programme.title: Wagon Team

programme.title: Maude

programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era querida y exitosa, lo cual hace que la brutalidad del crimen sea más difícil de entender.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El examinador médico clasificó la muerte como un accidente, pero los detectives que investigaron el caso declararon que la evidencia en la escena indicaba lo contrario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres fueron asesinados mientras dormían en sus camas. La noche siguiente, un incendio provocó la destrucción de una clínica de planificación familiar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1990, el cuerpo de Shirley Andronowich fue encontrado mutilado. Los testigos le dijeron a la policía que tuvo una pelea con su esposo la noche anterior, pero la evidencia forense demostró que él no tuvo nada que ver con su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una trágica jugada del destino, pocos días después de que la mujer vendiera su casa y se mudara a un modesto remolque, un incendio se llevó tanto el remolque como su vida. Pero la autopsia demostró que no fue un accidente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Impresiones fuertes
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de la Fuerza Aérea fue encontrada muerta en su cama con una bolsa plástica de lavandería cerca de su rostro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, la muerte de Crystal Purcell fue considerada un accidente. Luego en el 2001, Barbara Purcell llamó a la policía para sugerir que su desaparecido esposo había matado a Crystal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh no se presentó a su clase de música y su esposo Ken la encontró muerta al pie de las escaleras de su casa de Palo Alto. Tras una investigación adicional, el luminol revela evidencia de un asesinato en la cocina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El pensamiento rápido de un investigador lo ayuda a capturar una huella de zapato hecha en la nieve antes de que la evidencia se desvanezca.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.desc: Matthew and Walter's well comes in; Fallon asks to borrow the necklace Krystle pawned to help Matthew; at his mountain cabin, Steven and Claudia make love.

programme.desc: A troubled Rigo must choose between abandoning the lucrative tour or headlining the tour to help rescue the man who possibly murdered his father; with his friend Poppy by his side, he turns the tables on Sage and Collette.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: Prohibited from performing at the BMT Awards, Sage reluctantly agrees to let Rigo perform in his slot; at the live awards performance, Rigo reveals a surprise for everyone that changes the direction of the entire tour.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: Sage's actions during the night of the BMT Awards have landed him back in jail; Marquise's meddling upsets everyone; at the Tabernacle, Rigo thrills the audience, but haters confront him.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: At Sage's evidentiary hearings, the D.A.'s strategy is working and Sage could be tried for murder; meanwhile, things heat up between Marquise and Angel.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: Sage is freed from jail and ready to reclaim the tour as headliner; the Chicago show will be Rigo's final performance and he's under pressure tocome up with new material; Poppy and Collette butt heads over Rigo.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: With Calvary's imminent demolition, Lady Mae and Bishop seek a sign from God; Jacob digs into the family mansion's past; Grace learns the real reason why Bob Whitmore is so invested in keeping the Calvary congregation under his wing.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Noah returns to assist Grace with AJ; Bishop and Lady Mae explore Mavis' club as a venue, rekindling memories; Jacob uncovers a startling truth about the Greenleaf house's past, shaking the family's foundations.

programme.title: Flying Swords Of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: A Ming Dynasty freedom fighter (Jet Li), a female warrior (Zhou Xun) and a corrupt eunuch (Kun Chen) are among those who converge on a remote desert hostel that sits atop a city of treasures.

programme.title: Badges of Fury
programme.desc: In just 3 days, three cases of Smiling Murder shock Hong Kong. The young detective Wang Bu'er and his buddy Huang Feihong embark on an investigation full of excitement and unexpected events.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers visit Rose's college in London to try to get the parchment deciphered, only to lose it to Tyzonn, Moltor's latest alien lizard henchman.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The search for the next jewel leads the Rangers to Portugal, then to Brazil, with a new group of villains, the Fearcats, always one step ahead of them!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: It's up to Mr Hartford to restore the liquidized Tyzonn to his human form. But even then, will the man from Mercury join the team, or will his past with an ill-fated Intergalactic Emergency Response crew keep him from it?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Jessica Jeffries, an old college pal of Mr Hartford's turned big time news reporter, snags an exclusive interview with the Rangers for her show, "Good Morning, San Angeles."

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Will attempts to teach Tyzonn how to blend in on Earth, but when the Mercurian starts to copy Will a little too closely, the pair clash.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: With the Cannon of Ki Amuk and Mjolnir in their possession, the Rangers track the next clue to Mexico. There, the team has to contend with Kamdor & Miratrix, Flurious with his Chillers, and even Moltor and his Lava Lizards!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Having swiped the Paedra Aztec Del Compass from the Rangers, Moltor puts it in the possession of his old friend Blothgaar, the next clue to a jewel of the Corona Aurora.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using the compass, the Rangers finally find the 3rd Jewel of the Corona Aurora. Will is entrusted to get it back to the base, but is ambushed by Kamdor & Miratrix, and loses it to the villainous pair.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The son of Lord Zedd and Rita Repulsa, Thrax, unites all four Corona Aurora-seeking factions of villains into a new Evil Alliance.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: No longer having Ranger powers, the former Overdrive Rangers return to their civilian lives. All but Mack, who learns of Thrax's plans to destroy Sentinel Knight, and seeks out the only item capable of doing so, the legendary sword Excelsior.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers get a day off, and plan a relaxing picnic in the forest. Unfortunately for Rose, Tyzonn is obsessed with getting to know her better, which goes from flattery to annoyance very quickly.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Ronny runs into a stubborn obstacle named Will while trying to throw a Halloween party. When she is captured to power Moltor and the Fearcats's latest weapon, can Will steal her back?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive

programme.desc: It’s New Year’s Eve and all of Sunnyville is preparing to ring in the New Year! Santa is also getting ready for his well-deserved holiday! But where will he go? Find out with A Frozen New Years 2!

programme.title: A Boy Named Charlie Brown
programme.desc: Snoopy and all of your favorite Peanuts characters make their full-length feature debut in this classic animated movie based on the loveable comic strip by Charles M. Schulz.

programme.title: Escape from Planet Earth
programme.desc: When a hero astronaut from the blue-alien planet Baab (Brendan Fraser) gets trapped on a notoriously dangerous planet called Earth, his risk-averse brother (Rob Corddry) must save him.

programme.title: Astro Boy
programme.desc: In futuristic Metro City, scientist Tenma (voiced by Nicolas Cage) creates an amazing robot boy with hidden talents unlike anything you've ever seen.

programme.title: Space Chimps
programme.desc: Space Chimps is an intergalactic comedy that highlights the antics of astronaut chimps on a mission in space, where they demonstrate as much of 'the wrong stuff' as 'the right stuff.'

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven
programme.desc: A wonderful, song-filled feature about an unlovable, murdered mutt (Burt Reynolds) who returns to Earth to do a good deed. When he adopts an orphan girl who can communicate with animals and help lead him to his killer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: While searching for his parents, Arin and the Ninja rescue a baby dragon, uncovering a new mystery and mission for the team.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: When the Ninja are not invited to the Tournament of Sources, they break into the City of Temples to earn their entry.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: They Gather for the Feast
programme.desc: After earning invitations to the Tournament of Sources, the Ninja attend a banquet for Elemental Masters with friendly faces and old enemies, and Lloyd confronts a familiar face from his vision.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Inside the Maze
programme.desc: Arin continues his investigation into the missing Horns but makes time for Frak, who Sora suspects is working for Ras and Nya's first match pits her against Jay, still with no memory of their past.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects
programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Final Game
programme.desc: Arin learns a devastating secret about the Merge and confronts Lloyd as Cole stays behind to protect the dragon horns. Sora faces off against Nokt, and Wyldfyre is too late to stop the manipulation of the games.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: Arin, Zane, and Cole make a shocking discovery in the Monastery of Gates as they defend the Dragon Horns; the depowered Elemental Masters clash with the Wolf Mask army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Zane's search for Arin leads to an old friend but lands him in the middle of the Forbidden Five's hunt for the Prismatic Blades.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja learn of the Forbidden Five's quest to collect the Prismatic Blades, meanwhile Ras finally leads Arin to his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Sora, Nya and Riyu are summoned to New Djinjago to help a friend, and the mystery bounty hunter receives a new mission.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The mystery bounty hunter tracks Ras and Arin to the World Forest, while the Ninja search for the last Prismatic Blade.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin must choose between Ras and the Ninja as the battle for the Prismatic Blades rages across the World Forest.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: ThunderFang is freed, and only the Ninja stand between the Shatter Dragon of Chaos and his revenge.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Ras leads Arin and Sora into unexpected chaos in Mysterium while the Ninja recruit Jay for a special mission.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: With Mysterium under attack, Ras, Arin and Sora rely on the Sorceress for help, while Jay leads the Ninja to the Administration on their way to Lee.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Lloyd, Jay, Nya and Wyldfyre go undercover in the strange Land of Lee, while Riyu's training under Rontu is off to a bumpy start.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Underworld tests Arin and Sora's commitment to Ras, while Nya and Jay work together to expose Lee's secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Cole, Frak and Kai unearth a shocking discovery outside the Land of Lost Things, while the Ninja reunite to liberate Lee.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja escape Lee and head for the source of the threat, while Ras plans his next move.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: In the City of Temples, the Ninja find guidance from an unlikely source, while Cole, Kai and Frak battle the Hollow Ones in Imperium.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja embark on their separate journeys to awaken the Arc Dragon of Focus but deal with unexpected - and annoying - interruptions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja reach the Caves of Bells while Lloyd and Arin fight their way through the Spectral Lands to summon the Arc Dragon.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a bomb kills six on a helicopter flight, evidence points to a victim's wife who is influenced by two financial advisers (Annette O'Toole, Michael McKean).

programme.desc: The detectives suspect a comatose woman's husband tried either to commit a mercy killing or to kill her for her money.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two tenants of an apartment building decide to cancel a homeless man's lease on life after his screaming frustrates the neighborhood.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A heavy-metal rock star known for videos that are degrading to women is investigated for raping a college student.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan investigate when a man is killed after being emotionally and physically abused for years by his gifted son.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan bring a religious cult's leader to court after a woman is killed while planting a car bomb.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Stone and Kincaid (Michael Moriarty, Jill Hennessy) investigate further when a businessman (guest star Zeljko Ivanek) is acquitted of murder.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan's (Jerry Orbach, Chris Noth) investigation into a man's death leads them to a Russian mail-order bride (guest star Natalya Negoda). With Michael Moriarty.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un día de diversión, aprendizaje y recuerdos inolvidables. Habrá sonrisas, carcajadas y diversión sin fin.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día lleno de alegría junto a Little Angel y sus amigos! Desde expresar su amor por mamá hasta aventuras con juguetes, ¡únete a este viaje lleno de diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a los Little Angels en un día lleno de aventuras! Desde armar un puesto de limonadas hasta convertirse en princesas, explorar con la araña Itsy Bitsy y disfrutar de fiestas en pijama, ¡cada momento es mágico!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para divertirte al aire libre! Desde payasadas en el patio hasta patinaje, familias de dedos, seguridad en la cama, concientización sobre accidentes y faltar a clase, ¡un día de juegos y seguridad!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en una aventura mágica! Desde momentos tranquilos hasta monos juguetones, cuentos de hadas, búsquedas de huevos de Pascua, parques de diversiones, cumpleaños y paciencia, ¡es un día de maravillas y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Explora la seguridad con Little Angel! Desde el patio de recreo hasta la los primeros auxilios, pasando por la hora de la siesta y el cuidado de la piel. Será un viaje lleno de diversión para mantenerte a salvo.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus aventuras de diversión y risas, en las que pedalean hacia el éxito con determinación y perseverancia.

programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels y aprende sobre sus amigos los animales en esta emocionante aventura que seguro les arrancará muchas sonrisas a los más pequeños.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en un día lleno de emociones con Little Angel! Desde campamentos y aventuras piratas hasta visitas al zoológico, competencias de castillos de arena, aventuras heladas y la alegría navideña, ¡cada aventura es un tesoro de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels y disfruta de grandes risas, lecciones y momentos conmovedores mientras crecen.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members deliver a crushing blow to Kaido. Luffy and Yamato try to back them up, but Ulti stands in their way and Big Mom spots Luffy. Meanwhile, Nami and Carrot free themselves from their enemies and move on to take back Zeus!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Animal Kingdom Pirates gasp with surprise to see thousands of samurai warriors coming into the castle. In his dragon form, Kaido goes outside to fight the Akazaya members under the moon/

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shinobu tries to rescue the weakened Momonosuke but is found by King and attacked. On the other hand, Nami takes back Zeus from Big Mom and runs away but loses him again and gets chased by Zeus who is ordered to kill to her by Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky faces Big Mom with the help of Robin and Jimbei, but the Numbers come interrupting their battle. One of them holds Brachio Tank with Usopp and Chopper inside in his hand. Meanwhile, Yamato finally meets his son Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Minks struggle with a poor hand against the Gifters, Kin'emon tries to assist them, but Dogstorm and Cat Viper stop him and start fighting for the other Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who's-Who invites Drake and Hawkins to a plot to kill Queen. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats are facing two large monsters that remind them of the Giant who they once struggled to take down. As Luffy charges towards them, someone unexpected comes in to help.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Drake vows to fight alongside Luffy, but Zoro becomes skeptical and challenges him to a fight. Meanwhile, Usopp's practical joke pushes Nami into confronting Ulti, who is infuriated since her brother got attacked.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen uses a new version of the Plague Bullets which will turn the samurai into ogre-like monsters. Meanwhile, the Minks keep pushing the fight against the Gifters and drive Jack into a corner. However, Kaido stands up for his subordinate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy is hurrying to the rooftop and Yamato is trying to catch up to Momonosuke to protect him, the Akazaya members finally face off against Kaido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen, the Lead Performer, blazes away at samurai on the Performance Floor with the special version of the Plague Rounds, which turns them into hideous ogres that corner Zoro and Drake

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: King orders his subordinates to go after Momonosuke. Shinobu tries to protect him, but they are cornered by one of the strong Lead Performers from the Animal Kingdom Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato fights Sasaki and the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division to protect Momonosuke. Meanwhile, Zoro tries to get rid of the Gifters who have turned into Ice Oni, but Queen starts a horrible game which involves the antibody for the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ulti and Page One of the Tobi Roppo chase Nami and Usopp, after being infuriated by their attack as well as Luffy's declaration of becoming the King of the Pirates. Cornered, Nami gives in and Ulti pushes her to say the unthinkable.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Carrot and Wanda step in to help Marco, who is cornered by Big Mom and Perospero. In the meantime, Yamato fights a fierce battle against the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division led by Sasaki, while protecting Shinobu and Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Drake continue to chase Apoo to get the antibody against Ice Oni, while Chopper is trying to figure out how to fight the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hears a woman's scream for help and dashes into the room the scream can be heard from. However, it's a trap set up by Black Maria of the Tobi Roppo. Meanwhile, Luffy and Jimbei who are trying to reach the rooftop get help from the unexpected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Kaido begins the New Onigashima Project, Marco appears in front of Chopper and the others, who are struggling with Ice Oni. The members of the Tobi Roppo continue to give the Straw Hats a hard time while their former member helps Zoro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu that he once confronted a man, who came to Onigashima looking to get Kaido's head. His name was Ace. The two of them engaged in a fierce battle that eventually turned into an important friendship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The formidable Lead Performers of the Animal Kingdom Pirates stand in Zoro's way as he tries to get to the rooftop. Marco sees his late comrade in Zoro's determination and tries to pave the way for him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu about how Ace gave him hope for the future. Meanwhile, Luffy and the other allied pirates from the Worst Generation make it to the rooftop to finally face off against Kaido and Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's strong attack reminds Kaido of all the strong ones he's ever met. On the other hand, Luffy, Law, and Kid keep quarreling amongst themselves. Meanwhile, Sanji is caught and interrogated by Black Maria in what he calls "heaven."

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, Kid, Zoro, and Killer keep landing hard blows against Kaido in tandem despite the arguing. However, when Big Mom steps in and unleashes powerful lightning strikes, the tide turns for all except one of the rookies.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pummels Kaido with his well-trained Kong Gatling and delivers a final blow using all his strength. Big Mom tries to fight back, but Law gets in her way and Kid and Killer also try to finish Kaido off.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After watching the Straw Hats' departure to Onigashima, Tama wondered if there was anything she could do to help the Straw Hats and the samurai. Now that she's here on Onigashima, it's time to execute her powerful plan – Operation Kibi Dango!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji is captured and tortured by the merciless Black Maria. She names the terms of his release: to turn over one of his crewmates. He hesitates but has no other option. After much distress, he makes a move that surprises everyone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin bursts in to rescue Sanji along with Brook, and faces Black Maria, who is trying to keep Sanji as her pet. Meanwhile, Yamato, Momonosuke, and Shinobu are spotted hiding by the enemy, and they find themselves on the run again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper works hard to make the cure for Ice Oni, even though he is turning into one himself. Meanwhile, the infected Boss Hyogoro the Flower regains his youth and fights fiercely to protect Chopper and the others.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan hears voices beckoning him to a planet of "fire and ice," so he pursues, even though it means crossing hostile Nietzschean-controlled space.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: While caught in a battle between two Nietzschean prides, the crew captures a hostile who claims that his pride possesses a map of the slipstream.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew seeks a lost colony of Nietzscheans and discovers another crew that has been secretly helping them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A message from a collector sends Dylan on a quest to rescue a hostage and find the remains of the Commonwealth fleet.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Citizen Eight tries to remove Dylan from command of Andromeda.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew must stop a world shipbuilder before he launches another invasion.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is kidnapped by Nietscheans and forced to play mind games for the amusement of his captors.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Two Nietzschean siblings are in a stand-off over a weapon that can eliminate higher brain functions. The crew steps in so neither can get the weapon.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr returns, having joined with the Collectors and demanding the Route of Ages from his former crewmates.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A hostage situation ensues when the crew confronts Tyr. Beka is rescued, Tyr is killed, and Trance reveals her true nature.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A wrong turn in the slipstream leads Andromeda to a prison riot. When the dust settles, they discover a prisoner missing.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After a woman and her unborn child are stabbed to death on Halloween by a man wearing a wolf mask, investigators must calm the community and find the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a young woman home from college ends up murdered in her home and the tools of her demise turn out to be the rolling pin and carving knife the family planned to use for Thanksgiving dinner, investigators struggle to solve this holiday horror.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After responding to a robbery at a sporting goods store on Christmas Eve, an Irving, Texas police officer is gunned down in cold blood.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead on the side of the road, detectives are faced with the possibility that the killer might have been one of the many partygoers ringing in the new year.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A deranged shooter attacks a family Thanksgiving dinner, leaving four dead and even more wounded, setting off a massive holiday-season manhunt to catch the killer - before they can strike again.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: The holiday season screeches to a halt when six members of the Anderson family are discovered to have been gunned down in their home; detectives work closely with family friends to track down the shocking murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Ortega family's annual Christmas Eve party is destroyed when a man dressed as Santa, wielding handguns and a homemade flame-thrower opens fire; detectives are led down a terrifying path that leads them to a sociopath.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A holiday is ruined when a couple is gunned down in their bed during what looks like a brutal home invasion, but police soon discover the true motive for the double homicide is a shocking tale of deception and betrayal.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Earl and Terry Robertson are found brutally murdered in their home just before Thanksgiving; investigating whether this is a holiday robbery gone terribly wrong, or a crime committed by someone the couple knew and trusted.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Firefighters respond to a house fire and discover three gunshot victims inside; authorities pursue the heavily armed murderer through Christmas.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve in a quiet town, elderly couple Bob and Idella Young are brutally slain at home; a bloody glove found at the crime scene has the killer's DNA, but no one matches the sample.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: New Year's in a tiny town, Joanna and Carl Dutcher ring in the year with their grandson, days later, they are found violently killed; the hunt for the killer leads police to a sinister group that threatens the entire community.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town; after killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody; when police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Just before Christmas, the body of a young mother is found strangled inside a burning car in a quiet Minneapolis suburb and detectives suspect that she was killed by someone very close to her.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a mother and her two daughters fail to show up for Christmas dinner, officers enter their home and discover all three have been shot to death; the search for their killer reveals an unthinkable family nightmare.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Just before New Year's, a hockey mom is gunned down at her front door; later that night, seven more bodies are found in another suburban home; police discover a shocking connection between the two crimes as they track down the killer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death while driving her sons home from a Thanksgiving celebration; the hunt for her killer leads to an unlikely suspect, making investigators realize her murder is not as random as it seems.
